reviews.comment:
Nafta normal. Serví compra normal … no podes pagar con la aplicación de Ypf (para tener en cuenta) y no te hacen QR, quieren transferencia 🫣…

(Translated by Google)
Regular gasoline. Normal purchase service... you can't pay with the YPF app (just so you know) and they won't give you a QR code, they want a bank transfer 🫣...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w4ek56WTBSMU54ZVRscVN6SkVaRTF5TWxsek0wRRAB

reviews.comment:
A mi me paso también no me dejaron tomar un café con leche que traje de mi casa y lo peor es q les compre una semita. No lo puedo creer x dios que gente .Exelente atención y es obvio que si vas a un lugar que   vende comida no te van a dejar que consumas lo tuyo si no anda al rincón de Nápoles compra una coca y saca un tuper con piza y veremos

(Translated by Google)
It happened to me too; they wouldn't let me have the coffee with milk I brought from home, and the worst part is that I bought a semita (a type of bread roll). I can't believe it, what kind of people are they? Excellent service, and it's obvious that if you go to a place that sells food, they're not going to let you eat your own food. If you don't believe me, go to Rincón de Nápoles, buy a Coke, and take out a Tupperware container of pizza, and we'll see.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxNk5IUnlTbTEzTmtsUVVGOUNiRGhLTkRocVlrRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy poco lugar para estacionar. No sé ha modernizado como el resto de las YPF en cuanto a infraestructura y servicios.
Al querer presentar un reclamo no se encontraba el encargado

(Translated by Google)
Very little parking. It hasn't been modernized like the other YPF stations in terms of infrastructure and services.
When I tried to file a complaint, the manager wasn't there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21GdlZVVlJhWGR2VjA5dmNrOUdNaTF4Vm1aWlNFRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Excellent attention from Andrea Mereles and Emanuel Lillo. Speed ​​and efficiency and very good coffee

(Original)
Excelente atención de Andrea Mereles y Emanuel Lillo. Rapidez y eficiencia y muy buen café
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2trNExWaG5RM0ZCVDNoWFNFWnZURGxwZGpSTWJtYxAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala la atención de esta  señora , muy mal educada nos grito xq mis hijas querían comer unos conitos y chizitos que traían en una bolsa y no dejo que los consumieran! Siendo que habíamos comprado una agua saborizada para consumir en el lugar! La verdad gente así no debería trabajar en atención al público!

(Translated by Google)
This woman's service was terrible; she was incredibly rude and yelled at us because my daughters wanted to eat some cones and cheese puffs they had in a bag, and she wouldn't let them! Even though we had bought flavored water to drink there! Honestly, people like that shouldn't work in customer service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xadE1FMU9TV0ZIZVdOTWNsbGFOVkV0WjFZeE5XYxAB

reviews.comment:
Los playeros y el encargado tienen una atención pésima. El encargado un soberbio. Todos a los gritos y sin educación. Soy socio del A.C.A. y mi papá es socio vitalicio de hace 50 años, estamos muy conformes desde siempre con el servicio y los beneficios, somos de Corrientes capital y al conocer el A.C.A. de San Juan nos sorprendió que sea el único lugar de toda la provincia donde nos trataron mal. El Automovil Club Sede Central de Avenida del Libertador 1850 Bs. As. debería saber como atienden en la U.S. N°67 de San Juan Capital.

(Translated by Google)
The attendants and the manager provide terrible service. The manager is arrogant. Everyone is shouting and rude. I'm a member of the A.C.A. (Automobile Club of Argentina) and my father has been a lifetime member for 50 years. We've always been very satisfied with the service and benefits. We're from Corrientes, and when we visited the A.C.A. in San Juan, we were surprised to find it's the only place in the entire province where we've been treated badly. The Automobile Club's headquarters at Avenida del Libertador 1850, Buenos Aires, should know how they treat customers at the U.S. No. 67 in San Juan.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21sdWJGWktOMjA0WVhkRFpWaHBPVGhEVVhSVE4yYxAB

reviews.comment:
Se nota que son empleados publicos, el desgano maximo propio de provincia del interior

(Translated by Google)
You can tell they're public employees; the extreme apathy typical of a provincial inland area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21WNFYzUnlNa1E0TFZaQlNrNUxhWGh1ZEdGUmFsRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicio. Quiero destacar la muy buena atención y la predisposición de los chicos que cargan nafta: siempre amables, atentos y con buena onda, algo que hoy se valora muchísimo. Además, el sector de compras está muy bien equipado, con muchas opciones para comer, todo ordenado y práctico. Da gusto parar en un lugar así. Súper recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent gas station. I want to highlight the outstanding service and helpfulness of the attendants: always friendly, attentive, and positive, something that's highly valued these days. In addition, the convenience store is very well-stocked, with plenty of food options, all organized and convenient. It's a pleasure to stop at a place like this. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s5WVEweE5Ra3RzV0ZwQ1pETjNUbkpYVmxkS1VrRRAB

reviews.comment:
En el bar no se puede utilizar la app. El baño estaba bastante sucio y NO TENIAN ACEITE, TUVE QUE IR A LA OTRA YPF SOBRE LA 40

(Translated by Google)
The app isn't available at the bar. The bathroom was quite dirty and they were out of oil; I had to go to the other YPF station on Route 40.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21kc1RETm5lR1EwVW1OUVIzUlBSM00xTUVwWE5HYxAB

reviews.comment:
Después de muchísimos kilómetros sin servicio, es la única estación de servicio. Carisma y solo aceptan visa. No transferencia ni Mastercard. Agradezco haber tenido mediodía tanque, no me aceptaron débito de Banco Nación

(Translated by Google)
After many kilometers without service, this is the only gas station. It's friendly and only accepts Visa. No bank transfers or Mastercard. I'm grateful I got half a tank; they wouldn't accept my Banco Nación debit card.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25KVlFtcHZOa1ZhZGtWT1JHMDJNMkpSYTJOeVdHYxAB
